visual_description:
The audio opens with a high-pitched, piercing, and urgent cry, sounding like a desperate shout of "Neville!". The scene opens on a dark, chaotic view of what appears to be a structure collapsing. The camera is shaky and close to the action, capturing the frantic movement of splintering wood and debris. The background is almost entirely black, with the silhouettes of the falling objects creating a sense of disarray. White Chinese characters appear at the bottom of the screen, reading "纳威!". In the top right corner, the watermark "风行网" is visible. This is immediately followed by a loud, violent, and destructive crashing sound, as if a large wooden structure is being torn apart and falling. The camera angle shifts to a low, upward-looking perspective, showing a shower of glowing embers and wood fragments falling through a dark space. The light from the embers illuminates the chaotic debris, creating a sense of destruction and disorientation. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
